Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ömer Faruk Görçün Wins Best Paper Award at TransportaCom 2025

We are proud to share that our faculty member, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ömer Faruk Görçün presented his paper titled “Evaluating the Impact of Independent Auditing on the Sustainability Performance of Freight Transportation in a Type-2 Neutrosophic Fuzzy Environment” at the X International Conference of the First Category NEW HORIZONS of Transport and Communications 2025 – TransportaCom, held in Doboj, Republic of Srpska, Bosnia and Herzegovina.

We are delighted to announce that his work was honored with the Best Paper Award.

Dr. Görçün also proudly represented our university as a member of the International Committee and delivered the opening speech at the conference, contributing to its 20th-anniversary celebrations.

Congratulations to our esteemed professor for this remarkable achievement and for representing our institution on such a prestigious international platform.
